title: MemoryTombstone
description: JSON Schema for the F1 Amanah forget audit tombstone record. Every vector_forget operation must write a tombstone to the vault_audit trail. Tombstones themselves are permanent and cannot be deleted — they are the irreversible audit record required by F1 Amanah (Trust floor). See vector_forget_contract.md for H2/H8 specification.

type.description: Record type discriminator. Always 'MEMORY_TOMBSTONE'. Used to distinguish from other vault_audit record types.

memory_ids.description: Array of memory entry UUIDs that were deleted in this operation. Required — a tombstone without memory_ids is invalid.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the deletion. Known values: user_requested, outdated_information, session_cleanup, policy_violation, admin_purge, ttl_expired. Free text is accepted but known values enable filtering.

session_id.description: Session identifier that executed the vector_forget operation. Required for cross-referencing with 555_MEMORY telemetry.

actor_id.description: Identity of the actor who initiated the deletion. Values: authenticated user ID, agent session ID, or 'anonymous' for unauthenticated sessions. Never blank — use 'anonymous' if identity unknown.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the exact moment the deletion was executed. Set server-side, not client-provided.

floor.description: Constitutional floor authority for this record. Always 'F1_AMANAH' — tombstones are always under F1 jurisdiction.

lancedb_purged.description: H3: Whether the deletion also successfully purged the LanceDB hot cache entries. False if LanceDB purge failed (non-blocking).

query_used.description: If this tombstone was generated by a query-based forget (not direct ID), the query string used to identify targets. Null for direct ID-based deletes.

count.description: Number of memory entries deleted in this operation. Should equal len(memory_ids).

vault_audit_id.description: If written to Postgres vault_audit table, the auto-generated ledger_id from that table. Null if Postgres write failed or unavailable.

metadata.description: Optional additional context metadata for the tombstone. Not used by core logic — available for application-level audit enrichment.
